9: <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
10: <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Saira:wght@500;600;700;800&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
11: <style>
12: :root {
13:   --bg:       #fafaf9;
14:   --surface:  #ffffff;
15:   --surface2: #f2f1ef;
16:   --fg:       oklch(16% 0.012 260);
17:   --muted:    oklch(48% 0.012 260);
18:   --border:   oklch(88% 0.005 260);
19:   --accent:   oklch(59% 0.28 29);
20:   --accent-dark: oklch(48% 0.24 29);
21:   --accent-soft: oklch(59% 0.28 29 / 0.08);
22:   --font-display: 'Saira', system-ui, sans-serif;
23:   --font-body:    'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
24: }
25: 
26: *,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
27: html{scroll-behavior:smooth;-webkit-text-size-adjust:100%}
28: body{font-family:var(--font-body);font-size:1rem;line-height:1.65;color:var(--fg);background:var(--bg);-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;overflow-x:hidden}
29: img,svg{display:block;max-width:100%}
30: a{color:inherit;text-decoration:none}
31: button{font:inherit;cursor:pointer;border:none;background:none;color:inherit}
32: ul{list-style:none}
33: input,textarea,select{font:inherit;color:inherit}
34: 
35: .container{width:100%;max-width:1280px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 clamp(1rem,5vw,3rem)}
36: 
37: .section{padding:clamp(3rem,7vw,6rem) 0}
38: .section--dark{background:var(--fg);color:var(--bg)}
39: .section--dark .section-tag{color:var(--accent)}
40: .section--dark .section-sub{color:oklch(70% 0.01 260)}
41: .section--surface{background:var(--surface)}
42: 
43: .section-tag{display:inline-block;font-family:var(--font-display);font-size:0.75rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.18em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--accent);margin-bottom:1rem}
44: .section-title{font-family:var(--font-display);font-size:clamp(2rem,5vw,3.25rem);font-weight:700;line-height:1.1;letter-spacing:-0.01em;margin-bottom:1rem;text-wrap:balance}
45: .section-sub{font-size:1.05rem;color:var(--muted);max-width:620px;text-wrap:balance;line-height:1.7}
46: 
47: .accent-line{display:block;width:48px;height:3px;background:var(--accent);margin-bottom:1.5rem}
48: 
49: .btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:0.5rem;font-family:var(--font-display);font-size:0.8125rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.05em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:0.75rem 1.5rem;border:2px solid transparent;transition:all 0.2s ease;white-space:nowrap}
50: .btn--accent{background:var(--accent);border-color:var(--accent);color:#fff}
51: .btn--accent:hover{background:var(--accent-dark);border-color:var(--accent-dark)}
52: .btn--outline{border-color:var(--fg);color:var(--fg)}
53: .btn--outline:hover{background:var(--fg);color:var(--bg)}
54: .btn--outline-light{border-color:oklch(70% 0.01 260);color:var(--bg)}
55: .btn--outline-light:hover{background:var(--bg);color:var(--fg)}
56: .btn--ghost{color:var(--fg);padding:0.4rem 0.6rem;font-size:0.7rem;border-color:transparent}
57: .btn--ghost:hover{color:var(--accent)}
58: .btn--sm{padding:0.5rem 1rem;font-size:0.7rem}
59: .btn__arrow{font-size:1.2em;transition:transform 0.2s ease}
60: .btn:hover .btn__arrow{transform:translateX(3px)}
61: 
62: /* NAV */
63: .nav{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:100;background:oklch(100% 0 0 / 0.92);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(16px);border-bottom:1px sol
